uplink.description: 0x4c data frame, 6 samples + timestamp (upstream TTN example input; status 0x96 -> frameCounter 4, lowBattery)
0x4c data frame, single sample, no timestamp (status 0x00; current reading only)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (current sample 220/10=22.0 degC, humidity 45%). Single sample => no temperatureHistory/humidityHistory.

uplink.description: 0x4c data frame, two samples, negative current temperature, no timestamp (status 0x21 -> frameCounter 1, configurationDone)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Current sample 0xFFCE=-50 -> -5.0 degC (int16 BE two's complement, /10); prior sample 0x000F=15 -> 1.5 degC. Exercises negative temperature and the prior-sample history extras.

uplink.description: 0x4c data frame, single sample with timestamp (status 0x04 -> timestamp bit only)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Current sample 0x0109=265 -> 26.5 degC, humidity 55%. Timestamp field 0x14ABA3E9=346792937 + 1356998400 epoch offset -> 2023-12-28T19:22:17Z.

uplink.description: 0x30 keep-alive frame: no temperature/humidity data -> error
uplink._note: Synthetic; the keep-alive frame (0x30) carries only a status byte and no climate measurement, so the normalized codec returns an error rather than an incomplete measurement.

uplink.description: Payload shorter than frame code + status byte -> error
uplink._note: Synthetic guard: a single byte cannot carry a frame code and a status byte.
